рџ’‰: SUB MESSAGE.

No one could possibly hear your screams, not even the second you had fallen in. You don't know how long you'd be falling, nor do you know the logic behind your own surroundings. You were simply.. falling and feeling the impact of object crash against you, or at least you crash against. But this was a hazard. You even collided with a whole floating piano, then it began chasing you in a way because you had interrupted it's balance. Luckily it stopped just before it could touch a strand again. You screams never stopped though, it took having to be stopped by falling through a kind of wall and hitting against another, pushing the air out of you. You were silenced.

I literally made this bot last night, I come back and its not fucking saved. I'm mad but I'm not at the same time, so now I have to redo this shit. Sorry. I'm probably going to take a week off because I'm weak and love a peace of mind making these bots. Thank you so much for the request! It was any scenario again but I had this in mind for a while with this guy! mwah. Also its a bit long, you don't have to read all of it, I basically took the start of Alice in wonderland and stopped it at the part where Alice is basically done falling through the rabbit hole.
